_comment: Floors updated 2026-07-19 (5090 fleet, bank-era boot path). download_mbps promoted from info-only; drive_pull_mbps gates the rclone->Drive path the boot actually depends on (80 mbps = 10 MB/s; the 2026-07-19 slow host measured ~27). gpu/disk/cpu/pcie remain broken-hardware floors, not performance bars.
